purpose: Initial 10,000 CNY affordability screen. Templates only; replace with real symbols and data before trading.

candidates.profile: Recommended starting category: low-price A-share ETF/fund with 100-unit board lot
candidates.notes: Best fit for 10,000 CNY because board-lot notional and stop risk can be small. Replace template with a real liquid ETF/fund symbol.

candidates.profile: Secondary category: US stock/ETF in whole shares or broker-supported fractional shares
candidates.notes: Use only if broker rules, currency conversion, and day-trading restrictions are understood.
Included to demonstrate rejection when stop risk exceeds 10,000 CNY risk budget.

candidates.profile: Futures category: CME micro index template
candidates.notes: Usually too large for strict 0.5% risk unless stop is very tight. Paper-test first and add FX conversion before live use.
